title: ficus glandulifera var. camiguinensis
intro: Ficus glandulifera var. camiguinensis is a plant species native to the Philippines, belonging to the Ficus genus of fig trees. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Ficus glandulifera var. camiguinensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and provide antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for herbal use through decoction or infusion, with preparations also available in the form of capsules or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully confirm its medicinal efficacy.
